macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Around $77,600-$78,000, Testing Key Resistance Near $80K
items.summary: Bitcoin is hovering between $77,638 and $78,126, down 0.2% in 24 hours but up 4.3% weekly amid $996.4 million ETF inflows and MicroStrategy's $2.54 billion purchase of 34,164 BTC. Traders eye a breakout above $78K toward $80K-$94K.

items.title: $189 Million in Crypto Liquidations as Bitcoin and Ethereum Positions Wiped Out
items.summary: The crypto market saw $189 million in liquidations over 24 hours, with Bitcoin longs at $30.45 million and shorts at $18 million liquidated. Ethereum longs also faced significant losses amid volatile trading.

items.title: XRP Up 0.5% to $1.44, Solana Gains 1% to $86.34 Amid Flat Ether at $2,322
items.summary: XRP rose 0.5% to $1.44 and Solana climbed 1% to $86.34 over 24 hours, while Ether remained flat at $2,321.97 and Bitcoin dipped slightly to $77,638.

items.title: CLARITY Act Stalled in Senate Over Stablecoin Yield Disputes
items.summary: The CLARITY Act remains stalled amid Senate disagreements on whether stablecoin issuers should offer yields. Morgan Stanley is positioning itself in the stablecoin ecosystem.

items.title: Ethereum-Based Pepeto Presale Surpasses $9.5 Million Amid Bitcoin $125K Prediction
items.summary: Pepeto, an Ethereum project blending meme coin appeal with exchange tech, raised over $9.5 million in presale despite market sell-offs. ZeroStack CEO predicts Bitcoin at $125,000 soon, boosting altcoin potential.

items.title: Warnings on DeFi Risks from J.P. Morgan and Jefferies as Institutions Embrace Crypto
items.summary: J.P. Morgan and Jefferies issued warnings on DeFi vulnerabilities amid nearly $2 billion Bitcoin ETF inflows and institutional adoption. Concerns also rise over prediction markets and post-quantum encryption risks.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 Model
items.summary: OpenAI launched GPT-5.5, a new model available in ChatGPT and Codex that understands user intent faster and excels at complex scientific tasks. It also leads in image generation benchmarks, surpassing Gemini 3.1 Flash Image.

items.title: Intel Reports Strong AI-Driven Earnings
items.summary: Intel's CEO Lip Bu Tan highlighted robust AI-fueled financial results, pushing the stock past its dot-com peak. The company emphasized AI growth amid surging tech investments.

items.title: Meta and Microsoft Announce Major AI-Related Layoffs
items.summary: Meta and Microsoft are implementing deep cuts, potentially affecting up to 23,000 jobs, as AI spending ramps up significantly. This reflects broader tech sector job reductions tied to AI investments.

items.title: Google Plans $40 Billion Investment in Anthropic
items.summary: Google intends to invest up to $40 billion in rival AI firm Anthropic, amid discussions on serving massive models like Anthropic's Mythos (10T parameters) using Google Cloud TPUs.

items.title: Tech Leaders Back Universal Basic Income Amid AI Layoffs
items.summary: Elon Musk and other tech billionaires support universal basic income as AI drives widespread layoffs across companies. Lawmakers express skepticism over the proposal.

items.title: Google Cloud CEO Discusses Anthropic Partnership and TPUs
items.summary: Google Cloud CEO detailed massive compute capacity, TPU monetization, and collaboration with Anthropic on Mythos-sized models, comparing TPUs favorably to NVIDIA on total cost of ownership.

items.title: Ford Integrates AI Vision System in Truck Plant
items.summary: Ford's Dearborn Truck Plant deployed an AI Vision system to enhance factory operations without replacing workers, focusing on operational improvements.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Duke Nukem 3D RT Released
items.summary: A new ray-traced version of Duke Nukem 3D, titled Duke Nukem 3D RT, has launched, developed by Post Memetic. This marks a significant update to the classic game, highlighted in recent gaming discussions.

items.title: Microsoft Gaming Reverts to Xbox Branding
items.summary: Microsoft Gaming has announced a return to Xbox branding as part of a new mission statement. The change was discussed in Game Mess Mornings on April 24, 2026.

items.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 Sales Hit Eight Million
items.summary: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 has achieved sales topping eight million units. This major milestone was celebrated in recent gaming news coverage.

items.title: Invincible VS Adds Story Mode
items.summary: Invincible VS is receiving a story mode developed by the team behind the animated series. This update follows an open beta recap and was featured in fighting game news.

items.title: New VR Games Released: Little Nightmares VR and Beyond Sandbox
items.summary: Little Nightmares VR: Altered Echoes and Beyond Sandbox have launched on Quest, PCVR, and PSVR 2. Additional VR updates include Contractors Showdown and Forefront.

items.title: Fighting Game Updates: Street Fighter 6, Dragon Ball FighterZ, 2XKO, and More
items.summary: Recent fighting game news covers Street Fighter 6 developments, Dragon Ball FighterZ, Invincible VS open beta, 2XKO teasers, Avatar Legends, and Guilty Gear Strive updates.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Intel Stock Surges 23.6% in Best Day Since 1987 Amid AI Boom Recovery
items.summary: Intel's stock closed up 23.6%, its best performance since October 1987, with shares up 124% year-to-date as the company shows renewed growth. The US government's stake in Intel has quadrupled to ~$36B since August 2025.

items.title: Nvidia Stock Hits Record, Market Cap Exceeds $5 Trillion
items.summary: Nvidia's stock jumped 4.3% to close at a record high, pushing its market cap past $5T for the first time since October, fueled by a rally in chipmakers including Intel.

items.title: $16B Financing Closes for Oracle's Massive Michigan Data Center
items.summary: A $16B financing deal for Oracle's giant data center campus in Michigan has closed, with Bank of America selling $14B in bonds to support infrastructure powering major applications.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Full-Stack Silicon-Based Quantum Computer
items.summary: Quantum Motion has achieved a milestone by deploying the first full-stack quantum computer using standard silicon chip fabrication processes, potentially accelerating scalable quantum systems.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs into Mainstream
items.summary: Google and Qualcomm are advancing Android PCs to challenge Microsoft and Apple, aiming to scale the mobile OS to desktops and reshape personal computing.

items.title: Tesla Begins Robotaxi Production with Cybercab Ramp-Up
items.summary: Tesla has started production of its robotaxi, with the Cybercab expected to accelerate by year-end, marking a key step in autonomous vehicle deployment.
